rules.description: Forbid creating skills whose name uses the reserved 'internal:' namespace.

then.message: skill name '{skill_name}' uses the reserved 'internal:' namespace

rules.description: Replace the default 20-char minimum with a stricter 80-char minimum.

then.message: skill content must be at least 80 characters (got {content_length})

rules.description: Refuse to create skills that wrap an internal debug tool.

then.message: skill content references the debug_eval tool; route through skill review

rules.description: Demand an explicit target path for production deployments.

then.message: production skill creation requires an explicit target path

rules.description: Block skills whose body looks like a shell pipeline grabbing curl | sh.

then.message: skill content contains a 'curl | sh' pattern which is disallowed by policy
